# Home Theater Co.

Home Theater Co. is a luxury home cinema design and installation company serving the Washington DC metro area. The company specializes in custom home theaters, media rooms, acoustic design, lighting, sound isolation, and custom millwork. It has won multiple industry awards including CE Pro Home of the Year 2024 and EH Home of the Year 2018.

## Public Pages

- https://homecinemagroup.com/ — Homepage: overview of the business, featured services, portfolio highlights, and awards
- https://homecinemagroup.com/services — Services: detailed descriptions of home theater design, media rooms, acoustic treatments, lighting, sound isolation, and custom millwork
- https://homecinemagroup.com/projects — Portfolio: completed luxury home cinema and media room projects
- https://homecinemagroup.com/awards — Awards: industry recognition and accolades received by the company
- https://homecinemagroup.com/about — About: company background, team, and mission
- https://homecinemagroup.com/contact — Contact: inquiry form and contact details for consultations
